title: Terms of Reference (TOR) for Engagement of Security Services TAWLA – Dodoma Office
description: TAWLA seeks to engage a qualified and reputable security service provider to offer professional security services for its Dodoma office premises, personnel, assets, and visitors. Scope includes 24/7 guarding, access control, incident management, and safety support. Contract duration one year, renewable.

contact.name: TAWLA Procurement
contact.address: P.O. Box 9460, Dar es Salaam, Tanzania

eligibility: Qualified and reputable security service provider with trained, licensed security guards
